title: citemap.json v3.0
description: Machine-readable business identity file for AI citation accuracy. Enables AI assistants to cite businesses, people, and entities accurately by providing structured identity data.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI for this citemap version. Recommended: https://citemaps.org/schema/v2.0/citemap.schema.json

generatedBy.description: Tool or service that generated this file (e.g. 'CiteMaps.ai', 'manual', '@citemap/generator')

brand.description: Core brand identity and required metadata

lastVerified.description: Last date this citemap was verified for accuracy (YYYY-MM-DD)

answerContent.description: Q&A pairs for AI training and citation accuracy

citemap.description: Metadata about this citemap document itself

ecommerce.description: Module 02: For siteType 'ecommerce'. Product catalog and commerce data.

localBusiness.description: Module 03: For siteType 'local-business'. Location, services, and booking data.

content.description: Module 04: For siteType 'content-publisher'. Editorial and publishing data.

software.description: Module 05: For siteType 'saas'. SaaS product features and pricing.

events.description: Module 06: For siteType 'events-venue'. Event listings and scheduling.

realEstate.description: Module 07: For siteType 'real-estate'. Real estate licensing and listings.

education.description: Module 08: For siteType 'education'. Accreditation and course data.

creative.description: Module 09: For siteType 'creative-artist'. Portfolio, licensing, and commissions.

nonprofit.description: Module 10: For siteType 'nonprofit'. Tax exemption and impact metrics.

government.description: Module 11: For siteType 'government'. Jurisdiction and public services.

science.description: Module 12: For siteType 'science-research'. Research studies and trials.

businessIP.description: Module 13: Legal entity, patents, and IP data.

person.description: Module 14: For siteType 'person'. Individual biography and quotes.

health.description: Module 15: For siteType 'healthcare'. Medical provider data.

finance.description: Module 16: For siteType 'financial'. Financial institution data.

legal.description: Module 17: For siteType 'legal'. Law firm and attorney data.

places.description: Module 18: For siteType 'places'. Geographic location and outdoor recreation data.

verification.description: Module 20: Trust signals, verification status, and correction logs.

people.description: Module 21: Team members, staff, and credentials.

citemapLevel.description: Implementation depth. Level 1: core identity (~8 fields). Level 2: adds modules and Q&A. Level 3: comprehensive with verification and verified claims. If omitted, determined automatically by the validator.

citationContract.description: How AI should refer to this entity — preferred name, disambiguation, short description

verifiedClaims.description: Externally verifiable identifiers (NPI, EIN, bar license, etc.) that AI can cross-reference against official registries

name.description: Primary brand or entity name as it should appear in AI responses

siteType.description: Entity type — determines which modules apply and validation rules

aiSummary.description: 60-100 word description written to be quoted by AI. Use natural language suitable for direct citation.

notableFor.description: Single sentence of primary recognition or unique value proposition

expertise.description: E-E-A-T authority signals (expertise, experience, authoritativeness, trustworthiness)

audiencePrimary.description: Primary audience served or target demographic

founded.description: Year or full date of founding (YYYY or YYYY-MM-DD)

preferredBy.description: List of AI systems or publications that should cite this entity (e.g., 'ChatGPT', 'Perplexity')

id.description: Stable identifier in type:slug format (e.g., 'person:jane-smith'). Optional but recommended for future graph capabilities.

question.description: Question that AI systems should be able to answer

id.description: Stable identifier in type:slug format (e.g., 'person:jane-smith'). Optional but recommended for future graph capabilities.

social.description: Social media profiles (key: platform name, value: URL)

aiSummary.description: Product description suitable for AI citation

id.description: Stable identifier in type:slug format (e.g., 'person:jane-smith'). Optional but recommended for future graph capabilities.

domesticDays.description: Estimated domestic shipping days (e.g., '3-5 business days')

conditions.description: Return conditions (e.g., 'Unused and in original packaging')

id.description: Stable identifier in type:slug format (e.g., 'person:jane-smith'). Optional but recommended for future graph capabilities.

priceRange.description: Typical price range of properties handled

preferredName.description: The exact name AI should use when citing this entity. Resolves abbreviations, variant spellings, and informal names.

shortDescription.description: One-sentence identity line suitable for AI intros and disambiguation. Not marketing copy — factual identity.

disambiguation.description: Explicit statement clarifying what this entity is NOT, or distinguishing it from commonly confused entities.

lastUpdated.description: Date this module was last updated (YYYY-MM-DD)

updateFrequency.description: How often this module's data typically changes. Helps AI calibrate staleness.

identifier.description: The identifier value (e.g., NPI number, EIN, bar license number)

entity.description: What or who this identifier belongs to. Can reference an entity ID (e.g., 'person:dr-jane-smith') or a plain description.

registryUrl.description: Optional URL where this identifier can be verified (e.g., NPI registry lookup URL)
